androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatTextV.android:text: We’ve got a limited time offer just for you. Check it out.

TextView.android:text: You're the Primary account holder for your Mint Family
You are a Mint Family member

androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatTextV.android:text: Renew your plan now to be all good to go.

androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButto.android:text: Only Primary can cancel plan change.

androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatTextV.android:text: Renew your plan now to be all good to go.

TextView.android:text: Set up Auto Renewal because manual renewal is more work.
Enable and never worry about interrupted service

androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatTextV.android:text: When Auto Renewal is enabled you agree that Mint will automatically renew your plan and continue to charge you the full plan cost shown above including taxes and fees to your payment method at the end of each above-referenced billing cycle until you cancel. You may turn off Auto Renewal at any time by navigating to Payment in Account Settings and switching the toggle to the Off position.
